title: lotus alpinus
intro: Lotus alpinus, also known as the Alpine Water Lotus or Alpinus Lotus, is a species of aquatic plant belonging to the family Nymphaeaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus alpinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Lotus alpinus is typically prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
